dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal implements trend-following discipline using price closure beyond 20-period SMA as trend confirmation and ADX > 20 for directional conviction. Exit triggers on trend reversal (price crosses SMA opposite direction) or ADX weakness (< 15). The 3-bar ADX consecutive rule cannot be precisely encoded in this schema; recommend implementing as secondary filter. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: entries go LONG above SMA with ADX confirmation, SHORT below SMA with ADX confirmation. No volume confirmation required per original signal specification.

source_rule_text: A trader should maintain discipline to wait for clearly defined trend conditions before entering or staying in a trade, rather than acting on incomplete setups or consensus opinion.
